positive: A minimalist, highly stylized illustration of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) emerging from abstract cosmic clouds. The fox has an ethereal glow and nine visible tails. The background features geometric constellations and faint nebulae in deep indigo, sapphire blue, and violet. The style should be modern graphic art, combining Art Deco symmetry with bioluminescent fantasy elements. Composition must be perfectly centered, with the fox taking the central role. Use clean, strong outlines and solid areas of color with subtle gradient shifts for depth. Lighting should be dramatic and atmospheric, suggesting starlight from behind the subject. High contrast and defined silhouettes are essential for clear printing on fabric. Aspect ratio 1:1.
